# Chapter 8: Composites  (~100 pp)
- 8.1 Composite types: fibre-reinforced, particulate, laminate (12) · 8.2 Rule of mixtures (10) · 8.3 Anisotropy and lay-up design (15) · 8.4 Carbon fibre, glass fibre, aramid (15) · 8.5 Manufacturing: hand lay-up, autoclave, RTM, automated fibre placement (15) · 8.6 Sandwich structures (12) · 8.7 Failure section: delamination, impact damage, fatigue in composites (21)

**Archetype**: scaling, optimisation. **Project**: lay up a small fibreglass composite; load-test it; identify failure mode. **Exercises**: 25.
